mapper.select:
SELECT CODE_GROUP_ID AS groupCode, CODE_GROUP_NAME AS groupCodeName, USE_YN AS useYn, DATE_FORMAT(REG_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d') AS regDate, DATE_FORMAT(MOD_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d') AS modDate FROM tb_group_code WHERE DEL_YN = 'N'
AND CODE_GROUP_ID LIKE CONCAT('%', #{groupCode}, '%')
AND CODE_GROUP_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{groupCodeName}, '%')
ORDER BY CODE_GROUP_ID
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_group_code SET CODE_GROUP_NAME = #{groupCodeName}, USE_YN = #{useYn}, MOD_ID = 'SYSTEM' WHERE CODE_GROUP_ID = #{groupCode}
UPDATE tb_group_code SET DEL_YN = 'Y' WHERE CODE_GROUP_ID = #{groupCode}
mapper.select: SELECT CODE_GROUP_ID AS groupCode, CODE_ID AS code, CODE_NAME AS codeName, SORT_ORDER AS sortOrder, USE_YN AS useYn, DATE_FORMAT(REG_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d') AS regDate FROM tb_code WHERE CODE_GROUP_ID = #{groupCode} AND DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY SORT_ORDER, CODE_ID
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_code SET CODE_NAME = #{codeName}, SORT_ORDER = #{sortOrder}, USE_YN = #{useYn}, MOD_ID = 'SYSTEM' WHERE CODE_GROUP_ID = #{groupCode} AND CODE_ID = #{code}
UPDATE tb_code SET DEL_YN = 'Y' WHERE CODE_GROUP_ID = #{groupCode} AND CODE_ID = #{code}

UPDATE tb_detail_code SET DETAIL_CODE_NAME = #{detailCodeName}, SORT_ORDER = #{sortOrder}, USE_YN = #{useYn}, MOD_ID = 'SYSTEM' WHERE CODE_GROUP_ID = #{groupCode} AND CODE_ID = #{code} AND DETAIL_CODE_ID = #{detailCode}
UPDATE tb_detail_code SET DEL_YN = 'Y' WHERE CODE_GROUP_ID = #{groupCode} AND CODE_ID = #{code} AND DETAIL_CODE_ID = #{detailCode}
